source_unsafe_copy_scan.command: rg -n -i "Availability confirmed|Reserve Today|Reserve with 20% Retainer|reserve your date|reserves your date|date is guaranteed|artist is confirmed|booking is confirmed|non-refundable" src functions

no_secret_release_boundary_scan.notes: Only known documentation/code references and mock/test prefixes appeared; no real secret values, webhook URLs, card data, raw Gmail bodies, private Sheet URLs, broad D1 exports, or PII dumps were recorded.
